summary: Frontend testing for compact dashboard widgets completed successfully. All requested features are working: Dashboard layout uses rowHeight=26 with 3 widgets per row (w=4), chart containers use 130px height, pie charts have 55% outerRadius, stat cards are compact (h=2), AI Chart button opens NaturalLanguageChart dialog, Drill badges show on drillable widgets, cross-filtering and drill-down functionality both work correctly.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about width(-1) and height(-1) during initial render - does not affect functionality, charts render correctly after layout calculates

compact_layout: PASS: Grid layout uses rowHeight=26 (verified in code line 1301)
PASS: Chart container height set to 130px (line 269)
PASS: Pie chart outerRadius='55%' for compact display (line 283)
PASS: 3 widgets per row - verified grid items positioned at x=390, x=770, x=1150
PASS: Widget 3 (stat card) dimensions: 370x310px - smaller height confirms h=2
ai_chart_button: PASS: AI Chart button found in header with data-testid='ai-chart-btn'
PASS: Clicking AI Chart button opens NaturalLanguageChart dialog
PASS: Dialog shows 'Natural Language to Chart' title with AI badge
PASS: Input field with placeholder text for natural language query
PASS: Example queries visible: 'Show revenue by region', 'Compare sales across quarters', etc.
PASS: Query submission and chart generation flow works
widget_headers_drill_badge: PASS: 'Drill' badge visible on first widget (Sales by Region) header
PASS: Badge styled with cyan color (bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400)
cross_filtering: PASS: Clicking pie chart sector triggers cross-filtering
PASS: 'Filtered' badge appears on other widgets after filter applied
drill_down: PASS: Clicking bar triggers drill-down when widget has drilldown hierarchy
PASS: 'Drilled' badge appears on widget after drill-down
PASS: Drill breadcrumb shows navigation path: Home > Region: East > Reset
PASS: Toast notification shows 'Drilled into Region: East'
PASS: Chart data updates to show Q1/Q2 breakdown after drilling into region
chart_rendering: PASS: Bar chart renders at compact size with 5 bars visible
PASS: Pie chart renders with smaller radius
PASS: Stat card displays value (429,000) with 'Sum' label cleanly

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warning about negative dimensions during initial render could be improved by adding minWidth/minHeight props, but this is cosmetic as charts render correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all compact layout and AI Chart features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard compact layout verified: rowHeight=26, chartHeight=130, pie outerRadius=55%, widgets w=4 (3 per row), chart h=3, stat h=2. AI Chart button at data-testid='ai-chart-btn' opens NaturalLanguageChart dialog. Drill badges appear on widgets with drilldown hierarchy config. Cross-filtering creates 'Filtered' badge, drill-down creates 'Drilled' badge with breadcrumb navigation.

verification_screenshots.compact_dashboard: Shows 3 widgets in row: bar chart, pie chart, stat card
verification_screenshots.ai_chart_dialog: Shows Natural Language to Chart dialog with AI badge and example queries
verification_screenshots.after_drill: Shows drilled widget with breadcrumb, 'Drilled' badge, and toast notification

mocked_apis: None - all features use real endpoints
